en.seo.title: FaqAccordion qualification fixture
en.faq.title: Technical questions, answered clearly
en.q1: Can you review an existing pump specification?
en.a1: Yes. Share the operating conditions and available drawings so requirements can be checked before selection.
en.q2: Which documents can be supplied with an order?
en.a2: Documentation depends on the agreed scope and may include inspection records, material traceability and operating information.
